title: Deano's Origins
description: Custom Origins created by me for myself and my friends
body:
### **Attention! Deano's origins 2.0 is now in development. From 2.0 onward, my origins are moving to minecraft 1.21.1 for neoforge. I haven't decided whether i'll continue for fabric as well yet. but either way it will be primarily for neoforge 1.21.1 going forward. This may be subject to change later on.** 

-Deano, 5/22/2026
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

### Custom origins addon for the [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) mod.
Some my Idea, others requested by my friends.

### Additionally, this mod adds _modifiers_ which are a second origin layer.
Modifiers are intended to change less things than origins do but still add another level of options to your playstyle.

### You can join [my discord server](https://discord.gg/C8NhP4GAjy) to request the addition of origins or modifiers.
- You can also find more up to date documentation on each origin and modifier in my discord server as well as see the beta versions made during the process of setting up new origins/modifiers. 
(Though, you might find the documentation lacking at the moment)

### Bellow are the Dependencies used by my mod, their liscensing, and whether they are embedded. 
- Depedencies that are embedded into my mod **WILL** still be counted so be careful not to accidentally get a duplicate mod. (Versions earlier than 1.3.0 will not have dependencies embedded.)

### [Deano's Origin Modifications](https://modrinth.com/mod/deanos-origin-modifications)
- **Purpose:** A mod managed by my friend Mystic, made specifically to serve as a dependency for my Origins mod.
- **Liscense:** ARR
- **Embedded:** Yes

### [Melius Commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/melius-commands)
- **Purpose:** This mod is used to make custom commands which I can attach to my origins. It's a very useful mod, so feel free to check it out!
- **Liscense:** MIT
- **Embedded:** Yes

### [Melius Mover](https://github.com/VicoShrt/melius-mover-mod)
- **Purpose:** A mod made by my friend Vic0 which helps to automatically add the custom commands  used by my mod into the Melius Commands config.
- **Liscense:** I couldn't actually find one on his github page at the time of writing this
- **Embedded:** Yes

### [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- **Purpose:** Grants me the ability to resize various things with my Origins
- **Liscense:** MIT
- **Embedded:** Yes

### [Origins Extra Keybinds](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-extra-keybinds-fabric)
- **Purpose:** Enables me to make Origins with more than 2 origin exclusive keybinds
- **Liscense:** ARR
- **Embedded:** No. (It's ARR, and I don't have permission)

### [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli)
- **Purpose:** An addon to Apoli which enables me to make more complex powers for my Origins.
- **Liscense:** LGPL-3.0-only
- **Embedded:** Yes

### [Eggolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/eggolib)
- **Purpose:** Another addon to Apoli which grants me access to more power types.
- **Liscense:** MIT
- **Embedded:** Yes
